changelog: OFFLINE PERFECT: Complete offline functionality guaranteed
Service Worker: Enhanced caching with all critical assets
Service Worker: Robust fetch fallback prevents hanging
Service Worker: Added version.json and logo3.png to cache
Application: Comprehensive error handling for version checks
Application: Silent failure with graceful degradation
Fix: No more 'Uncaught in promise' errors in offline mode
Fix: Application starts immediately without network
Performance: Web Worker for puzzle generation (from v9.4)
Performance: Zero-wait board loading with cache (from v9.4)
